resources.string:
How to use 


1. Enable QR IME Sender in the input method settings.

 2. Move to the target app or screen where you want to enter text. Example: Chrome. 

 3. Tap the input field where the QR text should be entered. 

 4. Switch the keyboard to QR IME Sender. 

 5. Tap the [Scan QR] button on the keyboard and scan the QR code.
Scanning failed repeatedly. Returning to the main screen.
